summary.para: The addressing mode, defining how textures or gradients behave when being addressed outside their unit range.
Textures/gradients are clamped on the borders.
Textures/gradients are repeated with a mirroring pattern.
Textures/gradients are wrapping around with a repeating pattern.
A chain of bezier paths, optionnally closed.
A boolean indicating if the contour should be closed.
An array of every path segments on the contour.
A bezier path segment.
Origin point of the segment.
First control point of the segment.
Second control point of the segment.
A bezier segment.
Origin point of the segment.
First control point of the segment.
Second control point of the segment.
Ending point of the segment.
The fill mode types.
Determines the "insideness" of the shape by evaluating the direction of the edges crossed.
Determines the "insideness" of the shape by counting the number of edges crossed.
Fills a shape with a gradient.
The adressing mode (wrap, clamp or mirror) of this fill.
The filling method (non-zero or even-odd) of the fill.
The opacity of the fill.
A position within the unit circle (-1,1) where 0 falls in the middle of the fill.
An array of stops defining the gradient colors.
The fill type (linear or gradient).
The gradient fill types.
A linear gradient.
A radial gradient, centered at the radial focus of the gradient fill.
The gradient stops used for gradient fills.
The color of the stop.
At which percentage this stop applies. The value must be between 0 and 1, inclusively.
The IFill interface is implemented by filling techniques (solid, texture or gradient).
The filling method (non-zero or even-odd) of the fill.
The opacity of the fill.
A 2x3 transformation matrix used for 2D operations.
Returns the identity matrix (read-only).

returns.para: The identity matrix

summary.para: The matrix member at (0,0)
The matrix member at (0,1)
The matrix member at (0,2)
The matrix member at (1,0)
The matrix member at (1,1)
The matrix member at (1,2)
Returns a matrix with all elements set to zero (read-only).

returns.para: The zero matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.#ctor(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Initializes a Matrix2D with column vectors

member.param: The first column
The second column
The third column

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.Equals(System.Object)

summary.para: Checks if two matrices are equal.

member.param: The other matrix to compare with

returns.para: True when the matrix is equal to "other"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.Equals(Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Checks if this matrix is equal to another Matrix2D.

member.param: The other matrix to compare with.

returns.para: True if the matrices are equal, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.GetColumn(System.Int32)

summary.para: Gets a column of the matrix.

member.param: The column index, between 0 and 2 inclusively

returns.para: The column at "index"

summary.para: Gets a hashcode of the matrix.

returns.para: The hashcode of the matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.GetRow(System.Int32)

summary.para: Gets a row of the matrix.

member.param: The row index, between 0 and 1 inclusively

returns.para: The row at "index"

summary.para: Computes the inverse of the matrix.

returns.para: The inverse matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.MultiplyPoint(UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Transforms a position by this matrix (effectively by 2x3).

member.param: The point to multiply with this matrix

returns.para: The multiplied point

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.MultiplyVector(UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Transforms a direction by this matrix.

member.param: The direction to multiply with this matrix

returns.para: The multiplied direction

member.name: ?:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.op_Equal(Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D,Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Checks if two matrices are equal.

member.param: The left hand side matrix of the comparison
The right hand side matrix of the comparison

returns.para: True if "lhs" and "rhs" are equal, or false otherwise.

member.name: ?:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.op_Multiply(Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D,Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Multiplies two matrices.

member.param: The left hand side matrix of the operation
The right hand side matrix of the operation

returns.para: The multiplied matrix

member.name: ?:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.op_Multiply(Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Transforms a Vector2 by a matrix.

member.param: The left hand side matrix of the operation
The vector the matrix will be multiplied with

returns.para: The transformed vector

member.name: ?:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.op_NotEqual(Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D,Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Checks if two matrices are not equal.

member.param: The left hand side matrix of the comparison
The right hand side matrix of the comparison

returns.para: True if "lhs" and "rhs" not are equal, or false otherwise.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.RotateLH(System.Single)

summary.para: Creates a left-hand side rotation matrix.

member.param: The rotation angle, in radians

returns.para: The rotation matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.RotateRH(System.Single)

summary.para: Creates a right-hand side rotation matrix.

member.param: The rotation angle, in radians

returns.para: The rotation matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.Scale(UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Creates a scaling matrix.

member.param: The scaling vector

returns.para: The scaling matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.SetColumn(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Sets a column of the matrix.

member.param: The column index, between 0 and 2 inclusively
The column

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.SetRow(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Vector3)

summary.para: Sets a row of the matrix.

member.param: The column index, between 0 and 1 inclusively
The row

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.SkewX(System.Single)

summary.para: Creates a skew matrix on X.

member.param: The skew angle, in radians

returns.para: The skew matrix

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.SkewY(System.Single)

summary.para: Creates a skew matrix on U.

member.param: The skew angle, in radians

returns.para: The skew matrix

summary.para: Access element at [row, column].

returns.para: The value at [row, column]

summary.para: Access element at sequential index (0..5 inclusive).

returns.para: The value at [index]

summary.para: Returns a string representation of the matrix.

returns.para: The matrix string representation

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.ToString(System.String)

summary.para: Returns a string representation of the matrix using a format.

member.param: The format to be used for the matrix components

returns.para: The matrix string representation

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D.Translate(UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Creates a translation matrix.

member.param: The translation vector

returns.para: The translation matrix

summary.para: The path corner types, for joining path segments together.
A beveled corner.
A rounded corner.
A tipped corner with a sharp edge.
The path ending types.
A square path ending.
A rounded path ending.
A square path ending with a small extrusion.
Defines properties of paths.
How the corners of the path are displayed.
How the beginning of the path is displayed.
The stroke used to render the path.
How the end of the path is displayed.
Fills a shape with a pattern.
The filling method (non-zero or even-odd) of the fill.
The opacity of the fill.
The root node of the pattern
The rectangle that is repeated
A scene contains the whole node hierarchy.
The root of the node hierarchy.
A node inside a hierarchy.
The list of children nodes.
A clipper hierarchy that clips this node.
The list of shapes inside this node.
The transform of the node.
A generic filled shape.
All the contours defining the shape.
The fill used on the shape.
A transformation specific to the fill.
Whether the specified contours are convex.
The path properties.
Fills a shape with a single color.
The color of the fill.
The filling method (non-zero or even-odd) of the fill.
The opacity of the fill.
Defines how strokes are rendered.
The stroke color.
The stroke fill.
A transformation specific to the fill.
The stroke half-thickness.
The stroke pattern (dashes).
An offset to which the pattern starts.
How far the tipped corners might extrude.
Reads an SVG document and builds a vector scene.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.SVGParser.ImportSVG(System.IO.TextReader,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Kicks off an SVG file import.

member.param: The reader object containing the SVG file data
The DPI of the SVG file, or 0 to use the device's DPI
How many SVG units fit in a Unity unit
The default with of the viewport, may be 0
The default height of the viewport, may be 0
Whether the vector scene should be clipped by the SVG document's viewport

returns.para: A SceneInfo object containing the scene data

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.SVGParser.ImportSVG(System.IO.TextReader,Unity.VectorGraphics.ViewportOptions,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Int32)

summary.para: Kicks off an SVG file import.

member.param: The reader object containing the SVG file data
The viewport options to use
The DPI of the SVG file, or 0 to use the device's DPI
How many SVG units fit in a Unity unit
The default with of the viewport, may be 0
The default height of the viewport, may be 0

returns.para: A SceneInfo object containing the scene data

summary.para: A structure containing the SVG scene data.
A dictionary containing the scene node for a given ID
A dictionary containing the opacity of the scene nodes.
The vector scene.
The position and size of the SVG document
Fills a shape with a texture.
The adressing mode (wrap, clamp or mirror) of this fill.
The filling method (non-zero or even-odd) of the fill.
The opacity of the fill.
The texture to fill the shape with.
Provides various tools to work with vector graphics.
The alignement of the sprite, to determine the location of the pivot.
Bottom-center alignment.
Bottom-left alignment.
Bottom-right alignment.
Center alignment.
Custom alignment.
Left-center alignment.
Right-center alignment.
SVG origin alignment.
Top-center alignment.
Top-left alignment.
Top-right alignment.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.ApproximateSceneNodeBounds(Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode)

summary.para: Computes a rough approximation of the node hierarchy bounds.

member.param: The root node of the hierarchy to computes the bounds from

returns.para: An approximation of the root hierarchy axis-aligned bounding-box

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BezierSegmentsToPath(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment[])

summary.para: Converts an array of BezierSegments into a connected path.

member.param: An array of BezierSegment

returns.para: An array of path segments

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BezierSegmentToPath(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment)

summary.para: Convert a segments into a path.

member.param: The BezierSegment

returns.para: An array of two path segments

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.Bounds(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment[])

summary.para: Computes the bounds of a bezier path.

member.param: The path to compute the bounds from

returns.para: A Rect containing the axis-aligned bounding-box of the contour

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.Bounds(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<UnityEngine.Vector2>)

summary.para: Computes the bounds of a list of vertices.

member.param: The list of vertices to compute the bounds from

returns.para: A Rect containing the axis-aligned bounding-box of the vertices

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.Bounds(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,UnityEngine.Vector2&,UnityEngine.Vector2&)

summary.para: Computes the bounds of a segment.

member.param: The segment to flip
The output min value of the segment
The output max value of the segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BuildRectangleContour(UnityEngine.Rect,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Builds a BezierContour from a Rectangle.

member.param: The rectangle to build the contour from
The top-left radius of the rectangle
The top-right radius of the rectangle
The bottom-right radius of the rectangle
The bottom-left radius of the rectangle

returns.para: A BezierContour that follows the rectangle contour

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BuildSprite(System.Collections.Generic.List`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,System.Single,Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Alignment,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.UInt16,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Builds a sprite asset from a scene tessellation.

member.param: The list of tessellated Geometry instances
How many SVG "pixels" map into a Unity unit
The position of the sprite origin
If alignment is Alignment.Custom, customPivot is used to compute the sprite origin
The maximum size of the texture holding gradient data
True to have the positive Y axis to go downward.

returns.para: A new Sprite containing the provided geometry. The Sprite may have a texture if the geometry has any texture and/or gradients

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BuildSprite(System.Collections.Generic.List`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Alignment,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.UInt16,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Builds a sprite asset from a scene tessellation.

member.param: The list of tessellated Geometry instances
The position and size of the sprite geometry
How many SVG "pixels" map into a Unity unit
The position of the sprite origin
If alignment is Alignment.Custom, customPivot is used to compute the sprite origin
The maximum size of the texture holding gradient data
True to have the positive Y axis to go downward.

returns.para: A new Sprite containing the provided geometry. The Sprite may have a texture if the geometry has any texture and/or gradients

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BuildVectorImage(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,System.UInt32)

summary.para: Builds a sprite asset from a scene tessellation.

member.param: The list of tessellated Geometry instances
The maximum size of the texture holding gradient data

returns.para: A new VectorImage containing the provided geometry. The VectorImage may have a texture if the geometry has any texture and/or gradients

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.BuildVectorImage(Unity.VectorGraphics.SVGParser/SceneInfo)

summary.para: Builds an antialiased VectorImage from a vector scene definition.

member.param: The SVGParser.SceneInfo to build the VectorImage from.

returns.para: A VectorImage constructed from the vector scene definition.

summary.para: A small value used everywhere by the vector graphics package.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.Eval(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single)

summary.para: Evaluates the position on a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the position
The parametric location on the curve

returns.para: The position on the curve at parametric location "t"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.EvalFull(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector2&)

summary.para: Evalutes both the position and tangent on a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the normal
The parametric location on the curve
The output tangent at parametric location "t"

returns.para: The position on the curve at parametric location "t"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.EvalFull(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector2&,UnityEngine.Vector2&)

summary.para: Evalutes the position, tangent and normal on a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the normal
The parametric location on the curve
The output tangent at parametric location "t"
The output normal at parametric location "t"

returns.para: The position on the curve at parametric location "t"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.EvalNormal(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single)

summary.para: Evalutes the normal on a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the normal
The parametric location on the curve

returns.para: The normal of the curve at parametric location "t"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.EvalTangent(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single)

summary.para: Evaluates the tangent on a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the tangent
The parametric location on the curve

returns.para: The tangent of the curve at parametric location "t"

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.FillMesh(UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Collections.Generic.List`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,System.Single,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Fills a mesh geometry from a scene tessellation.

member.param: The mesh object to fill
The list of tessellated Geometry instances, generated by TessellateNodeHierarchy
How many SVG "pixels" map into a Unity unit
Set to "true" to have the positive Y axis to go downward.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.FillUVs(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/TextureAtlas)

summary.para: Fill the UVs of the geometry using the provided texture atlas.

member.param: The geometry that will have its UVs filled
The texture atlas used for the UV generation

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.FindBezierLineIntersections(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Find the intersections (up to three) between a line and a curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment
The first point
The second point

returns.para: Returns the Bezier's 't' parametric values where the line p0-p1 intersects the segment, up to 3 values

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.FlipSegment(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment)

summary.para: Flips a segment direction.

member.param: The segment to flip

returns.para: The flipped segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.FlipVerticesInBounds(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<UnityEngine.Vector2>,UnityEngine.Rect)

summary.para: Flip the vertices (in-place) inside their axis-aligned bounding-box.

member.param: The vertices to realign
The bounds into which the vertices will be realigned

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.GenerateAtlas(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,System.UInt32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Generates a Texture2D atlas containing the textures and gradients for the vector geometry.

member.param: The list of Geometry objects, probably created with TessellateNodeHierarchy
Maximum size of the generated texture
Resize the texture to the next power-of-two
Encode the gradient settings inside the texture
If true, the texture will be created in linear colorspace

returns.para: The generated texture atlas

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.GenerateAtlasAndFillUVs(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/Geometry>,System.UInt32)

summary.para: Generates a Texture2D atlas containing the textures and gradients for the vector geometry, and fill the UVs of the geometry.

member.param: The list of Geometry objects, probably created with TessellateNodeHierarchy
Maximum size of the generated texture

returns.para: The generated texture atlas

summary.para: Holds the tessellated Scene geometry and associated data.
The color of the geometry.
The fill of the geometry. May be null.
The filling transform of the geometry.
The triangle indices of the geometry.
The setting index of the geometry.
The unclipped bounds of the geometry.
The UV coordinates of the geometry.
The vertices of the geometry.
The world transform of the geometry.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.IntersectLines(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Finds the intersection between two infinite lines

member.param: The first point of the first line
The second point of the first line
The first point of the second line
The second point of the second line

returns.para: The intersection point, or (float.PositiveInfinity, float.PositiveInfinity) if the lines are parallel

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.IntersectLineSegments(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Finds the intersection between two line segments

member.param: The first point of the first line
The second point of the first line
The first point of the second line
The second point of the second line

returns.para: The intersection point, or (float.PositiveInfinity, float.PositiveInfinity) if the lines are parallel

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeArc(UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)

summary.para: Approximates a circle arc with up to 4 segments.

member.param: The center of the arc
The starting angle of the arc, in radians
The "length" of the arc, in radians
The radius of the arc

returns.para: An array of up to four BezierSegments holding the arc

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeCircleShape(Unity.VectorGraphics.Shape,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single)

summary.para: Builds a circle shape.

member.param: The shape object that will be filled with a circle.
The position of the circle, relative to its center.
The radius of the circle.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeEllipseShape(Unity.VectorGraphics.Shape,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single,System.Single)

summary.para: Builds an ellipse shape.

member.param: The shape object that will be filled with an ellipse.
The position of the circle, relative to its center.
The x component of the radius of the circle.
The y component of the radius of the circle.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeLine(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Builds a line segment.

member.param: The starting position of the line segment
The ending position of the line segment

returns.para: A straight line BezierSegment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakePathLine(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Builds a line path segment.

member.param: The starting position of the line segment
The ending position of the line segment

returns.para: A BezierPathSegment array of two elements, configured in a straight line

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeRectangleShape(Unity.VectorGraphics.Shape,UnityEngine.Rect)

summary.para: Builds a rectangle shape.

member.param: The shape object that will be filled with a rectangle.
The position and dimensions of the rectangle.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.MakeRectangleShape(Unity.VectorGraphics.Shape,UnityEngine.Rect,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Builds a rectangle shape.

member.param: The shape object that will be filled with a rectangle.
The position and dimensions of the rectangle.
The top-left radius of the rectangle
The top-right radius of the rectangle
The bottom-right radius of the rectangle
The bottom-left radius of the rectangle

summary.para: Struct to hold a texture atlas location.
The fill associated with this entry, may be null.
The position of the entry inside the atlas.
True if the entry is rotated by 90 degrees.
The size of the entry inside the atlas.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.PathEndsPerfectlyMatch(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment>)

summary.para: Checks if the two ends of a BezierPathSegment chain are at the same location.

member.param: The chain of BezierPathSegments

returns.para: True if the two ends of the chain are at the same location, false otherwise

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.PathSegmentAtIndex(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment>,System.Int32)

summary.para: Computes the BezierSegment at a given index from a list of BezierPathSegments.

member.param: The chain of BezierPathSegments
The segment index

returns.para: The BezierSegment at the given index

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.QuadraticToCubic(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Converts a quadratic bezier to a cubic bezier

member.param: The starting position of the quadratic segment
The control position of the quadratic segment
The ending position of the quadratic segment

returns.para: The resulting BezierSegment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.RealignVerticesInBounds(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<UnityEngine.Vector2>,UnityEngine.Rect,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Realigns the vertices (in-place) inside their axis-aligned bounding-box.

member.param: The vertices to realign
The bounds into which the vertices will be realigned
A boolean indicating whether to flip the coordinates on the Y axis

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.RenderSprite(UnityEngine.Sprite,UnityEngine.Material,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Draws a vector sprite using the provided material.

member.param: The sprite to render
The material used for rendering
If true, clear the render target before rendering

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.RenderSpriteToTexture2D(UnityEngine.Sprite,System.Int32,System.Int32,UnityEngine.Material,System.Int32,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Renders a vector sprite to Texture2D.

member.param: The sprite to render
The desired width of the resulting texture
The desired height of the resulting texture
The material used to render the sprite
The number of samples per pixel for anti-aliasing
When true, expand the edges to avoid a dark banding effect caused by filtering. This is slower to render and uses more graphics memory.

returns.para: A Texture2D object containing the rendered vector sprite

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SceneNodeBounds(Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode)

summary.para: Computes a pretty accurate approximation of the scene bounds.

member.param: The root node of the hierarchy to computes the bounds from

returns.para: An approximation of the node hierarchy axis-aligned bounding-box

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SceneNodes(Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode)

summary.para: Lists every nodes under a root node.

member.param: The root node

returns.para: The enumerable listing every nodes under "root", including the root itself.

summary.para: Structure holding the SceneNode computed transforms, opacities and enumeration path.
The node we are currently visiting.
The parent of the node we are currently visiting.
The accumulated world opacity of this node.
The accumulated world transform of this node.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SegmentLength(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single)

summary.para: Computes the length of a single curve segment.

member.param: The curve segment on which to evaluate the length
The precision of the length computation

returns.para: The length of the segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SegmentsInPath(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment>,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Iterates through every segment in a list of path segments.

member.param: The path segments to iterate from
Whether to return the segment connecting the last point to the beginning of the path

returns.para: An enumerable of every segments in the path

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SegmentsLength(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment>,System.Boolean,System.Single)

summary.para: Computes the combined length of a segment chain.

member.param: The curve segments on which to evaluate the length
A boolean indicating if the length of the segment joining the first and last points should be computed
The precision of the length computation

returns.para: The combined length of the segment chain

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SegmentsLengths(System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment>,System.Boolean,System.Single)

summary.para: Computes the individual lengths of a segment chain.

member.param: The segments on which to compute the lengths
A boolean indicating if the length of the segment joining the first and last points should be computed
The precision of the lengths computation

returns.para: An array containing the lenghts of the segments

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.SplitSegment(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,System.Single,Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment&,Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment&)

summary.para: Splits a curve segment at a given parametric location.

member.param: The curve segment to split
The parametric location at which the segment will be split
The output of the first segment
The output of the second segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TessellatePath(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierContour,Unity.VectorGraphics.PathProperties,Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/TessellationOptions,UnityEngine.Vector2[]&,System.UInt16[]&)

summary.para: Tessellates a path.

member.param: The path to tessellate
The path properties
The tessellation options
The resulting vertices
The resulting triangles

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TessellateRect(UnityEngine.Rect,UnityEngine.Vector2[]&,System.UInt16[]&)

summary.para: Tessellates a rectangle.

member.param: Rectangle to tessellate
The output vertices
The output triangles

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TessellateRectBorder(UnityEngine.Rect,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector2[]&,System.UInt16[]&)

summary.para: Tessellates a rectangle border.

member.param: Rectangle to tessellate
The half-thickness of the border
The output vertices
The output triangles

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TessellateScene(Unity.VectorGraphics.Scene,Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils/TessellationOptions,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2<Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode,System.Single>)

summary.para: Tessellates a Scene object into triangles.

member.param: The scene containing the hierarchy to tessellate
The tessellation options
If provided, the resulting node opacities

returns.para: A list of tesselated geometry

summary.para: Structure to store the tessellation options.
The maximum distance on the cord to a straight line between to points after which more tessellation will be generated. To disable, specify float.MaxValue.
The maximum angle (in degrees) between the curve tangent and the next point after which more tessellation will be generated. To disable, specify float.MaxValue.
The number of samples used internally to evaluate the curves. More samples = higher quality. Should be between 0 and 1 (inclusive).
The uniform tessellation step distance.
A struct to hold packed atlas entries.
The atlas entries.
The texture atlas.

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TransformBezierPath(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment[],UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Transforms a path by a transformation matrix.

member.param: The path to transform
The translation to apply
The rotation to apply, in radians
The scaling to apply

returns.para: The transformed path

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TransformBezierPath(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierPathSegment[],Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Transforms a path by a transformation matrix.

member.param: The path to transform
The transformation matrix to apply on the curve segment

returns.para: The transformed path

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TransformSegment(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,UnityEngine.Vector2,System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector2)

summary.para: Transforms a curve segment by a translation, rotation and scaling.

member.param: The curve segment to transform
The translation to apply on the curve segment
The rotation to apply on the curve segment
The scaling to apply on the curve segment

returns.para: The transformed curve segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.TransformSegment(Unity.VectorGraphics.BezierSegment,Unity.VectorGraphics.Matrix2D)

summary.para: Transforms a curve segment by a transformation matrix.

member.param: The curve segment to transform
The transformation matrix to apply on the curve segment

returns.para: The transformed curve segment

member.name: M:Unity.VectorGraphics.VectorUtils.WorldTransformedSceneNodes(Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2<Unity.VectorGraphics.SceneNode,System.Single>)

summary.para: Iterates through every nodes under a root with computed transform and opacities.

member.param: The starting node of the hierarchy
Storage for the resulting node opacities, may be null

returns.para: An enumeration of every node with their pre-computed world transforms, opacities and paths.

summary.para: An enum describing the viewport options to use when importing the SVG document.
Don't preserve the viewport defined in the SVG document.
Applies the root view-box defined in the SVG document (if any).
Preserves the viewport defined in the SVG document.
